done_rule: Done requires a formally exhaustive, machine-checkable closure surface with no remaining parser rejection debt, no remaining staged coverage/gap debt, and no plausible grammar-level gap remaining for the family claim.
required_surface_missing_detail: SystemVerilog preprocessor still lacks an explicit grammar-level exhaustive proof surface that can turn the current bounded syntax, aggregate, and reachability evidence into a zero-plausible-gap closure claim.
